headline: Franklin Resources Leadership Shakeup And What It Could Mean For Valuation
summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) has announced major senior leadership changes, including new heads for U.S. Product and Global Insurance & Institutional Asset Solutions. The firm also named a new chief operating officer for its Global Client Group, expanding oversight of client relationships and distribution. The incoming executives bring experience from large asset managers, including BlackRock and Goldman Sachs, with a focus on product development, institutional platforms, and digital...
